  n0: 1
  n1: 3
  n2: 2
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    a: 0
    text: "[100]"
  }
  restriction {
    a: 0
    a: 1
    a: 0
    text: "[010]"
  }
  restriction {
    a: 0
    a: 0
    a: 1
    text: "[001]"
  }
  tensor: "0"
}

  index: 1
  n0: 1
  n1: 3
  n2: 2
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    a: 0
    text: "[100]"
  }
  restriction {
    a: 0
    a: 1
    a: 0
    text: "[010]"
  }
  tensor: "a02*b20*c00 + a02*b21*c10"
}

  n0: 1
  n1: 3
  n2: 2
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    a: 0
    text: "[100]"
  }
  tensor: "a01*b10*c00 + a01*b11*c10 + a02*b20*c00 + a02*b21*c10"
}

  index: 3
  n0: 1
  n1: 3
  n2: 2
